senses.gloss: to live in comfort, to be pleased
to be soft, to be delicate, to be fine
to favor, to coddle, to pamper

examples.text: فَأَمَّا الْإِنْسَانُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَاهُ رَبُّهُ فَأَكْرَمَهُ وَنَعَّمَهُ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّي أَكْرَمَنِ
examples.english: Now, whenever a human being is tested by their Lord through [His] generosity and blessings, they boast, “My Lord has [deservedly] honoured me!”

senses.gloss: how good is...! how lovely is...!

examples.english: What an excellent work it is to help the poor.
What a good student Ibrahim is.
